title: abyss * tree-style_invite_systems_reduce_AI_slop
description: Discusses the effectiveness of Lobste.rs's invite-only membership system in reducing AI-generated content (AI slop) and maintaining a human-centric community.

concepts.name: AI Slop
concepts.definition: Low-quality or unqualified AI-generated content or PRs that inundate platforms like GitHub.

concepts.name: Lobste.rs Membership System
concepts.description: An invite-only registration system where users can send invites after 70 days, emphasizing trust-based growth.

concepts.name: Tree of Trust
concepts.definition: A metaphorical representation of the Lobste.rs community structure based on invitations and trust.

concepts.name: Moderation Efficiency
concepts.description: The ability to easily identify and prune AI-sloppy accounts or branches, raising the cost for such campaigns.

concepts.name: Eternal September
concepts.definition: Preserving a site's early, human-centric nature and preventing it from becoming dominated by machines.
